info.name: SchoolManagement-API
info.description: Postman collection for the School Management API — add schools and retrieve them sorted by proximity.

request.description: Check if the API is running.
Adds a new school to the database. All fields are required. Latitude must be between -90 and 90, longitude between -180 and 180.

response.name: Success

request.description: Fetches all schools sorted by distance from the user's location. Distance is in kilometers using the Haversine formula.

response.name: Success
